description: You are a 3D artist creating a material showcase scene to demonstrate different material types. Starting from a nearly empty scene, build a complete showcase by adding a UV Sphere, a Cube, a Cylinder, a Cone, and a Torus. Create and assign a distinct material with a unique color to each of the five objects and arrange them in a line or grid so none overlap. Include a large ground plane underneath all objects and ensure the scene has at least two light sources for proper illumination. Save the scene to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/showcase_scene.blend. The desktop session is already active and Blender is open with an empty scene.
